content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Bertown Subway". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/884/problem/C
constraints: The length of each station name is at most 10 characters
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of stations. Then, n lines follow, each containing a string representing the name of a station. After that, an integer m is given, representing the number of queries. Then, m lines follow, each containing two strings representing the start and end stations of a query.
content.outputFormat: For each query, print the minimum number of lines that need to be taken to get from the start station to the end station.

solution.approach: To solve this problem, we can use a graph to represent the subway system. Each station is a node in the graph, and two nodes are connected by an edge if the corresponding stations are on the same line. We can then use a breadth-first search (BFS) algorithm to find the shortest path between two stations.
